name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Allergy Control Salmon 2kg
shortDescription: It solves the problem of redness and itching on the skin of cats suffering from food allergies. It fixes possible problems in the digestive tract. It ensures the health of skin and feathers. Due to uniform and hydrolyzed proteins, it optimizes both your cat's skin and digestive health. It optimizes digestive health with probiotics and prebiotics in its content.
description: How it works: Uniform (salmon) protein source, Content rich in hydrolyzed proteins, High digestibility, Marigold extract (anti-inflammatory and antiseptic), Coconut oil (skin and coat health). Hydrolyzed Protein Dalton weight is less than 1000 Dalton. Ingredients Salmon Protein, Hydrolyzed Salmon Protein, Yellow Pea, Brown Rice, Salmon Oil, Pea Protein, Sugar Beet Pulp, Coconut Oil, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Wild Seed. Raw Material Components Raw Protein 31.27% Raw oil 14.74% Raw Cellulose (Fiber) 3.26% Ash 7.25% Moisture 4.50% Omega-3 1.05% Omega 6 2.69% Calcium 1.23% Phosphorus 0.73% Sodium 0.41% Magnesium 0.086% Nutritional Supplements Vitamin A (3a672a) 25,000 IU/kg Vitamin D 3 (E671) 850 IU/kg Vitamin E (3a700) 700mg/kg Vitamin C (3a312) 500mg/kg Choline Chloride (3a890) 2.300 mg/kg Biotin (3a880) 4mg/kg Vitamin B 1 (3a821) 10mg/kg Vitamin B2 30mg/kg Niacinamide (3a315) 50mg/kg Calcium-D-Panthothenate (3a841) 50mg/kg Vitamin B 6 (3a831) 35mg/kg Folic Acid (3a316) 15mg/kg Vitamin B 12 0.03 mg/kg Zinc Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (3b606) 150mg/kg Ferrous Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E1) 110mg/kg Manganese Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E5) 65mg/kg Potassium Iodide (3b201) 4.2mg/kg Cupric Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E4) 12mg/kg Organic Form of Selenium (3b8.10) 0.2mg/kg Taurine (3a370) 2.600 mg/kg L-Carnitine (3a910) 100mg/kg L-Methionine (3c305) 4,000 mg/kg Probiotic (B. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
